---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a tool or improvement for DevToolkit
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What developer problem would this solve? Describe what doesn't work or is missing.

## Solution

Describe the tool or feature you'd like to see. Be specific about inputs, outputs, and behavior.

## Usage Frequency

How often would you use this tool/feature?
- [ ] Multiple times per day
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Rarely

## Existing Alternatives

Does another Acode plugin or built-in feature already solve this?
- [ ] Yes — please specify:
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

## Mobile Context

How would this work on a phone screen? Any specific mobile considerations?

## Mockup / Example

If applicable, add a sketch, screenshot, or link to an example of how this should look/work.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues — this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature would be useful for other mobile developers
- [ ] I am willing to help test this feature
